title: [release-1.27] Adresses CVE-2024-1753 and CVE-2024-24786, bump to V1.27.4
body:
Try 2.  

Replaces #5429

comments.body:
The CI is dead in this repo and we only have about two months of required support for it.  After discussing with Matt, we've decided to move forward with this, as long as the equivalent PR #5434 from release-1.29 passed tests.  We'll then vendor into Podman, ensure CI works there, then hand off to QE.

@mheon @nalind @rhatdan PTAL and merge

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *giuseppe*, *TomSweeneyRedHat* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.27/OWNERS)~~ [TomSweeneyRedHat,giuseppe] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

We turned off CI for this branch, so I don't expect Total Success to ever be reported.
/override "Total Success"
